items.phrase: I'm going to have a race against …
items.example: James had a race against two freerunners.

items.phrase: The way it works is this.
items.example: The way it works is this: the pump is powered by children playing.
First of all, it prepares the ingredients, then it cooks them.

items.phrase: All you have to do is …
items.example: All you have to do is press the button.

items.phrase: The best thing about it is that …
items.translation: Самое лучшее в этом то, что …
items.example: The best thing about it is that you can save time.
It works like this: you put the ingredients in and close the lid.
Basically, Robo-Chef can prepare and cook all your favourite recipes.
What could be easier than a machine that cooks for you?
